feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Giovanni's Rocket command floor beneath Celadon.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red is holding the command-floor door so Giovanni cannot call Rocket reinforcements.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill found a Nexus Order terminal trace inside Giovanni's command system.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Giovanni confronted Antman directly for the first time in Celadon.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket's Silph Scope cache is on the command floor.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Gold Dust ledger prices the Silph Scope and Rocket's stolen research.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight left a dream signal in Giovanni's command terminal.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Giovanni retreated from the Celadon command floor.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Pokemon Tower's deeper route is unlocked.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Erika's gym path is open as Celadon stabilizes after Rocket's retreat.
